sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32075" key="e(kkaideka/dwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑκκαιδεκά-δωρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n32075.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sixteen palms long,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:11:4:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.4.109</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
